roll_text_levels: Sell: Your next roll is free.
Sell: Your next two rolls are free.
Sell: Your next three rolls are free.
pets.notes: No explicit Roll trigger metadata; relies on non-Roll trigger logic with roll-referencing ability text.

roll_text_levels: Roll 3 times: Stock ANY food from the 3 last unlocked tiers and discount it by 1 gold.
Roll 3 times: Stock ANY food from the 3 last unlocked tiers and discount it by 2 gold.
Roll 3 times: Stock ANY food from the 3 last unlocked tiers and discount it by 3 gold.
Roll & Sell: Give newly rolled shop pets +1 attack and +1 health.
Roll & Sell: Give newly rolled shop pets +2 attack and +2 health.
Roll & Sell: Give newly rolled shop pets +3 attack and +3 health.
Roll: Gain +1 attack and +1 health until next turn. Works 5 times per turn.
Roll: Gain +2 attack and +2 health until next turn. Works 5 times per turn.
Roll: Gain +3 attack and +3 health until next turn. Works 5 times per turn.
Start of battle: Remove 1 health from the two first enemies for each roll this turn.
Start of battle: Remove 2 health from the two first enemies for each roll this turn.
Start of battle: Remove 3 health from the two first enemies for each roll this turn.
pets.notes: No explicit Roll trigger metadata; relies on non-Roll trigger logic with roll-referencing ability text.

roll_text_levels: Roll: Gain one free roll. Works 2 times per turn.
Roll: Gain one free roll. Works 4 times per turn.
Roll: Gain one free roll. Works 6 times per turn.
Faint: Transform friend behind into a level 1 Mimic Octopus. Give it +1 XP in battle for every 2 roll.
Faint: Transform friend behind into a level 1 Mimic Octopus. Give it +2 XP in battle for every 2 roll.
Faint: Transform friend behind into a level 1 Mimic Octopus. Give it +3 XP in battle for every 2 roll.
pets.notes: No explicit Roll trigger metadata; relies on non-Roll trigger logic with roll-referencing ability text.

roll_text_levels: Roll: If 4 shop pets are the same tier, re-roll and give friends +2 health. Works 4 times per turn.
Roll: If 4 shop pets are the same tier, re-roll and give friends +4 health. Works 4 times per turn.
Roll: If 4 shop pets are the same tier, re-roll and give friends +6 health. Works 4 times per turn.
Start of battle: Gain +1 health for each roll (max 2).
Start of battle: Gain +2 health for each roll (max 2).
Start of battle: Gain +3 health for each roll (max 2).
pets.notes: No explicit Roll trigger metadata; relies on non-Roll trigger logic with roll-referencing ability text.

roll_text_levels: Faint: Gain one free roll next turn.
Faint: Gain two free rolls next turn.
Faint: Gain three free rolls next turn.
pets.notes: No explicit Roll trigger metadata; relies on non-Roll trigger logic with roll-referencing ability text.

roll_text_levels: Start of battle: Give the nearest friend ahead +2 mana for each roll this turn, up to 3 rolls.
Start of battle: Give the nearest friend ahead +4 mana for each roll this turn, up to 3 rolls.
Start of battle: Give the nearest friend ahead +6 mana for each roll this turn, up to 3 rolls.

roll_text_levels: Roll: Give new shop pets +1 attack and +1 health until next turn for each roll, up to 5 rolls.
Roll: Give new shop pets +2 attack and +2 health until next turn for each roll, up to 5 rolls.
Roll: Give new shop pets +3 attack and +3 health until next turn for each roll, up to 5 rolls.
End turn: Give adjacent friends +1 attack and +1 health for every 4 roll, up to 8 rolls.
End turn: Give adjacent friends +2 attack and +2 health for every 4 roll, up to 8 rolls.
End turn: Give adjacent friends +3 attack and +3 health for every 4 roll, up to 8 rolls.
pets.notes: No explicit Roll trigger metadata; relies on non-Roll trigger logic with roll-referencing ability text.

roll_text_levels: Faint: Summon one 3/3 Boat. If it's your first Boat this battle, give it +1 and +1 for each roll.
Faint: Summon one 6/6 Boat. If it's your first Boat this battle, give it +2 and +2 for each roll.
Faint: Summon one 9/9 Boat. If it's your first Boat this battle, give it +3 and +3 for each roll.

roll_text_levels: Start of turn: Roll four times while freezing pet copies and tier 6 food.
Start of turn: Roll eight times while freezing pet copies and tier 6 food.
Start of turn: Roll twelve times while freezing pet copies and tier 6 food.
